title: neottia lanceolata
intro: Neottia lanceolata, also known as the lance-leaf grass pink or pink lady's slipper orchid, is a type of orchid that belongs to the genus Neottia. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Neottia lanceolata include its ability to help lower blood pressure, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory issues. It can be prepared as a tea or tincture, and its herbal preparations are often used to treat various health conditions.
